title.rendered: Celebrating 5 Consecutive Nominations for British Travel Awards

content.rendered:
We are thrilled to announce that we have been nominated for the British Travel Awards for the fifth consecutive time in the category of Best Travel Money Retailer. This is a significant achievement for us, as we have previously won the silver award and last year, the bronze award for the same category.

The British Travel Awards are the largest and most prestigious awards in the UK travel industry, often referred to as the Oscars of the travel industry. Being nominated for the award alone is a great accomplishment and a testament to the Travel FX‘s on going commitment to quality.

The competition is fierce, as we go head to head with high street giants like the Post Office, who have millions of customers gracing their shops across the UK every day. As a smaller, online company, we don’t have the volume of customers that the Post Office does, but we pride ourselves on offering the most competitive rates and exceptional customer service.

Our customer service rating on consumer platforms like Trustpilot is substantially better than our competitors, and we are proud to offer our customers significant savings on every purchase. We believe that our commitment to customer satisfaction is what sets us apart from the competition, and we are thrilled to be recognized for our efforts.

We are excited to share the voting link on June 19th and look forward to announcing the prizes. We would like to thank all our customers for their continued support and trust in us. It is your loyalty that has helped us reach this milestone, and we are grateful for your business.

Being nominated for the British Travel Awards 2023 for the fifth consecutive time is a significant achievement, and we are proud to be recognized for our commitment to customer satisfaction and competitive pricing. We would greatly appreciate your vote for us when the voting links are shared on June 19th!

By voting in the BTAs, you will automatically be entered into a prize draw with a list of fantastic travel and holiday prizes. The prize list will be announced soon, so keep an eye out for that. We would like to thank our customers for their continued support and we hope to continue serving you with the best service and pricing in the industry. So, please vote for us and help usa win the award this year.

itemListElement.name: Celebrating 5 Consecutive Nominations for British Travel Awards

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
